headline: T. Rowe Price Retirement Push Adds Crypto ETF And Valuation Questions
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NasdaqGS:TROW) is expanding its global retirement leadership team following an executive retirement, with new appointments focused on retirement solutions. The firm has introduced an actively managed crypto ETF that includes Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin and Shiba Inu. These moves reflect an effort to broaden its retirement offering and add exposure to digital assets within its product lineup. T. Rowe Price Group, known for its active mutual funds and retirement products,...
